_meta.note: Grounded drug profile. Clinical/safety/regulatory fields are sourced from public data (ClinicalTrials.gov NCT04437511; Sims et al. JAMA 2023, DOI 10.1001/jama.2023.13239; CMS NCD 200.3; FDA). Commercial fields are transparent modelling inputs, editable in the app. This is an internal strategic decision-support artifact, NOT promotional material and NOT medical advice.
sources: Sims JR et al. JAMA 2023;330(6):512-527. DOI 10.1001/jama.2023.13239 (via PubMed)
CMS National Coverage Determination 200.3 (Monoclonal Antibodies Directed Against Amyloid for AD)

modality: Humanized IgG1 monoclonal antibody targeting N3pG (pyroglutamate) amyloid-beta plaque
indication: Early symptomatic Alzheimer's disease (MCI due to AD and mild AD dementia) with confirmed amyloid-beta pathology

pivotal_trial.name: TRAILBLAZER-ALZ 2
pivotal_trial.design: Randomized, double-blind, placebo-controlled, 18-month, 277 sites in 8 countries
pivotal_trial.enrollment_innovation: Tau-PET-based enrollment (low/medium vs high tau); amyloid + tau confirmation required
pivotal_trial.dosing_innovation: Limited-duration dosing: patients switched to placebo once amyloid clearance criteria met
pivotal_trial.primary_endpoint: Change in iADRS at 76 weeks (range 0-144, lower = worse)

safety.boxed_warning: Amyloid-related imaging abnormalities (ARIA); higher risk in APOE4 homozygotes
safety.monitoring: Serial MRI required before and during dosing; APOE4 genotyping recommended pre-treatment

differentiators: Limited-duration therapy: dosing stops once amyloid is cleared, lowering cumulative cost and patient burden vs open-ended competitors
Q4W infusion schedule (vs competitor Q2W) - fewer infusion-center visits
Largest reported plaque clearance and a tau-stratified evidence base
Robust functional benefit signal (iADRS + CDR-SB both significant)
liabilities: ARIA safety burden requires MRI-capable sites and specialist oversight
Amyloid-confirmation diagnostic gate (PET/CSF/plasma) creates a funnel bottleneck
IV administration and infrastructure demands limit community-practice reach
APOE4 homozygote risk-benefit and genotyping add pre-treatment friction

kol_advisors.name: Stephen Salloway
kol_advisors.institution: Alpert Medical School of Brown University / Butler Hospital
